title: Cobblemon Accessories
description: add pokemon clothing cosmetics from the anime to cobblemon!
body:
## Adding clothing cosmetics from the Pokémon anime to Cobblemon!

Some of the newly added ones: 

- Ash cap from the Galar region.
- Lilie's large-brimmed white hat.
- Serena's red hat from the XY series.
- Serena's gray hat from the Journey series.
- Dawn's beanie
- GwynnZA Hat

i've been wanting to make this for a long time and just realized it now, and i'll add more clothing accessories from the pokemon anime to cobblemon, if i have time, so enjoy the game and have fun, support cobblemon 1.7!


### How to install?, just download this resource pack and put it in your resourcepack folder and load the resourcepack

# how to get cosmetic items?
To get the cosmetic item, you'll need a carved pumpkin and an anvil. Simply rename the carved pumpkin in the anvil and change it to

- carved pumpkin --> Ashjourney
- carved pumpkin --> SerenaXy
- carved pumpkin --> SerenaJn
- carved pumpkin --> LilieHat
- carved pumpkin --> Dawn
- carved pumpkin --> GwynnZA

for example, see the image below![for example, see the image below](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bccbe476795a5c15ce0ffd6913a86d6a32f71fa.png)
